contents.models/: Enriched model JSONs with topic stats, keywords, and run metadata
contents.articles/: Analysis-ready CSVs with article-level topic assignments and probabilities
contents.articles/topic_timeseries_eng.csv: Monthly topic counts for trend visualisation
